iterations.description: Issue body is empty with no details about which fields to add, where, or why, and the triage comment already requests reproduction steps on current build.
Wontfix: Custom user fields require schema migration (XML + SQL + LiteDB) across all storage backends

notes: Feature: additional user-defined fields (UserField). Schema extension, low priority.
